[[BLOCK:p_11]]
Research Interests

[[BLOCK:p_12]]
Mental health of children and adolescents: Early identification of psychological risks (心理风险早期识别), digital interventions, and the development of an AI-driven physical and mental health support system (AI驱动的身心健康支持体系) focusing on depression, anxiety, school refusal, and Problematic Internet Use (问题性网络使用).

[[BLOCK:p_13]]
Student learning progress: Enhancing learning efficiency, mechanisms for habit formation, interventions for school refusal, and the development of the Precision Learning 3.0 (精准学习3.0) AI-assisted system.
